text.title: Process Mining and Intelligent Automation Analysis Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the process-mining-automation methodology end-to-end.

step.name: profile-logs
step.action: Schema completeness + case-id quality check; reject if below threshold.

step.name: conformance-check
step.action: Token replay; identify deviations + fitness score.

step.name: score-candidates
step.action: Apply matrix; total score with breakdown.

step.name: assess-verdict-and-roi
step.action: Pick verdict per candidate; estimate ROI.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
